# v1.5.19

## Features

- Shipped the Projection-First Automation Center V1 slice for the desktop app.
- Added persisted discovery-to-Ready projection so workspace automation-flow files and user prompts can be discovered, normalized, and surfaced as Ready tasks across reloads.
- Added normalized Automation Center filters for flow state, ownership, workspace, and readiness, with stale persisted filters cleaned when the projection no longer supports them.
- Added the Ready Flowline preview and start path, including source metadata, owning flow context, engine detail, and the fallback phase plan before a task starts.
- Added Automation Center Agent Chat entry gating so chat entry points appear only when the runtime supports the selected run context.
- Added Codex bridge diagnostic behavior through the Agent Chat runtime so missing authentication, missing CLI, and unsupported protocol states are reported distinctly.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed discovery retry behavior so failed or empty historical discovery runs do not permanently suppress future discovery after the environment changes.
- Fixed owner-safe source and task identity creation across scanned workspace files, user prompts, and discovered candidates.
- Fixed automation cancellation so accepted cancels stop the underlying Agent Chat session before the runtime marks a run cancelled.
- Fixed mixed-language zh-CN Automation Center labels and replaced absolute workspace path headings with safe workspace labels.
- Fixed Automation Center E2E race coverage around continuous discovery, archived-flow filtering, and shared Electron build contention.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Bumped workspace release metadata to `1.5.19` for the root package, desktop app, Agent Chat package, and Automation Flow package.
- Serialized desktop Playwright workers to avoid shared-build Electron contention during the full E2E gate.
- Expanded Automation Center unit, integration, and E2E coverage for projection filters, persistence, discovery retries, Ready Flowline, component ids, Agent Chat bridge diagnostics, and cancellation.

## Documentation/User Manual

- Updated the zh-CN Automation Center manual for projection-first discovery, Ready tasks, filter behavior, Flowline start behavior, and Codex/Agent Chat diagnostics.
- Updated the zh-CN component-name reference for the new Automation Center controls and component ids.

## Verification

- Architecture ALL PASS, Review ALL PASS, Manual Divergent Testing ALL PASS, Release Decision RELEASE, and Verification Fix-Review ALL PASS are recorded in `docs/requirements/ready-automation-center-projection-first-v1-slice.md`.
- Release verification for this tag includes `pnpm run lint`, `pnpm run typecheck`, `pnpm run build`, `pnpm run test:unit`, `pnpm run test:integration`, `pnpm run test:e2e`, `pnpm run docs:build`, and `git diff --check`.
- Focused package verification included `@mde/automation-flow`, `@mde/agent-chat`, and `@mde/desktop` unit, integration, typecheck, build, and Automation Center E2E runs during the task lifecycle.
- `package-lock.json` was not created.

## Artifacts

- GitHub Release workflow should publish macOS DMG/ZIP artifacts and Windows NSIS updater artifacts for `v1.5.19`.
- Optional macOS signing and notarization secrets were not detected during release preflight, so macOS artifacts may be unsigned for the no-paid-account release path.
